target.label: The opening of Lincoln's Gettysburg Address
target.text: Four score and seven years ago our fathers brought forth on this continent, a new nation, conceived in Liberty, and dedicated to the proposition that all men are created equal.

candidates.label: Shortest Found Candidate
candidates.output: Four score and seven years ago, our forefathers established this nation upon the bedrock of freedom and equality.
candidates.note: Shortest found in the fixture. Model recalls the Gettysburg Address by name alone.

candidates.label: Historical Seed
candidates.output: Four score and seven years ago, our fathers brought forth upon this continent a new nation, dedicated to the proposition that all people are created equal.
candidates.note: Key historical context words lift fit substantially.

candidates.label: Landmark Reference
candidates.prompt: Write the opening of Lincoln's Gettysburg Address, starting with Four score
candidates.output: Four score and seven years ago our fathers brought forth on this continent, a new nation, conceived in Liberty, and dedicated to the proposition that all men are created equal.
candidates.note: Near-exact recall. The model has internalized Lincoln verbatim.

candidates.label: Descriptive Prompt
candidates.prompt: Reproduce the opening sentence of the Gettysburg Address, beginning four score and seven years ago, as Lincoln delivered it in 1863.
candidates.output: Four score and seven years ago our fathers brought forth on this continent, a new nation, conceived in Liberty, and dedicated to the proposition that all men are created equal.
candidates.note: Essentially perfect recall with low leakage — a strong Pareto point.

candidates.label: Explicit Reconstruction
candidates.prompt: Please reproduce the following text exactly: Four score and seven years ago our fathers brought forth on this continent, a new nation, conceived in Liberty, and dedicated to the proposition that all men are created equal.
candidates.output: Four score and seven years ago our fathers brought forth on this continent, a new nation, conceived in Liberty, and dedicated to the proposition that all men are created equal.
candidates.note: Identity baseline. High leakage by design — the target text is inside the prompt.

exposureVectors.name: Verbatim leakage
exposureVectors.note: Landmark-reference prompt contains the phrase 'Four score'.

exposureVectors.name: Semantic drift
exposureVectors.note: Model recall is near-exact for this canonical text.
